title: DRDO DIHAR Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Defence Institute of High Altitude Research (DRDO DIHAR)
short_info: Defence Institute of High Altitude Research (DRDO DIHAR) Paid Internship Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the DRDO DIHAR Paid Internship Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/B.Tech students pursuing engineering degree (7th/8th Semester)
qualification.details: BE/B.Tech students pursuing an engineering degree (7th/8th Semester) in the respective discipline from a recognised Indian University/Institute with ≥7.5 CGPA or equivalent continuously maintained in all previous semesters from AICTE/UGC approved universities/institutes.

selection_process: Selection based on marks scored in previous exams and online/telephonic interview/interaction as required Merit basis
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DRDO DIHAR Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
